rag_rules: AGREE annex blocks must be scoped to their owning component declaration
Use assign only for implementation-level output bindings with existing features
generic_rules: Place assumptions and guarantees in component type annexes when they reference visible model features with concrete bounds
Write output dependency guarantees that relate visible inputs to visible outputs
Component type contracts should not reference implementation-only subcomponent paths
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL properties as AGREE variables without explicit model exposure
Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope
irrelevant_topics: AADL property names as AGREE variables
Model fusion and scope preservation rules
